stem: When the experts arrived, the puma ___ the village.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。arrived 是过去参照点，“离开”发生在其之前，即过去的过去，用 had already left。

stem: The animal ___ from a private collection, for pumas are not found wild in Britain.
explanation: 考点:must have done。对过去发生的事作有把握的肯定推测用 must have + 过去分词；肯定推测不用 can have done。

stem: Reports ___ for weeks before the police took them seriously.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。before the police took 给出过去参照点，报告的积累在此之前完成，用 had accumulated。

stem: It ___ been an ordinary cat; the paw prints were far too large.
explanation: 考点:推测的否定形式。对过去情况的否定推测用 can't have done（不可能……），不能说 mustn't have done。

stem: By the time the hunters reached the spot, the puma ___ (disappear) into the hills.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。by the time + 一般过去时给出过去参照点，主句动作先于它发生，填 had disappeared。

stem: Bill ___ the church tower every night for weeks.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。every night for weeks 强调动作从过去持续至今，用 has been climbing。

stem: The vicar is glad that the old bell ___ working again.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。强调“已经开始工作”这一结果对现在的影响；start 是短暂动词，不宜用完成进行时表结果。

stem: We ___ money for the church clock since last spring.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。since last spring 表示持续到现在且可能继续，突出筹款过程，用 have been raising。

stem: With that bell, you ___ everyone in the village!
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。强调“已经把大家吵醒”这一既成结果，而非持续过程，用 have woken up。

stem: He ___ (try) to repair the bell night after night for weeks.
explanation: 考点:现在完成进行时。night after night for weeks 强调反复持续的过程，填 has been trying。

stem: An ancient temple ___ by archaeologists on the promontory last year.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。temple 是被发现的对象，且有明确过去时间 last year，用 was discovered。

stem: Long before it fell, the city ___ a prosperous trading centre.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。before it fell 给出过去参照点，“曾是繁荣中心”是更早的过去，用 had been。

stem: The fragments ___ into a full-length figure of the goddess.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。fragments 是被复原的对象，强调至今已完成的结果，用 have been reconstructed。

stem: Sacred objects ___ in the temple before the city was destroyed.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。objects 是被保存的对象，且发生在 was destroyed 之前，用 had been kept。

stem: By 1990, the whole site ___ (explore) by three different teams.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。by 1990 表示过去某时之前已完成，site 是受动者，填 had been explored。

lessonTitle: The double life of Alfred Bloggs
stem: People ___ do manual work often earn more than office clerks.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 people 指人且在从句中作主语，用 who；whom 只作宾语，which 指物。

lessonTitle: The double life of Alfred Bloggs
stem: Alfred ___ as a dustman for over ten years now.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。for over ten years + now 表示从过去持续到现在的状态，用 has worked。

lessonTitle: The double life of Alfred Bloggs
stem: The office job ___ he has always dreamed of is finally his.
explanation: 考点:定语从句。先行词 job 指物，在从句中作 dreamed of 的宾语，用 that/which；what 不能引导定语从句。

lessonTitle: The double life of Alfred Bloggs
stem: His wife, ___ has known the secret from the start, never told the neighbours.
explanation: 考点:非限制性定语从句。逗号后的从句不能用 that；先行词 his wife 指人且作主语，用 who。

lessonTitle: The double life of Alfred Bloggs
stem: He ___ (keep) his real job a secret from his neighbours for years.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。for years 表示持续至今的状态，keep 用现在完成时 has kept。

stem: The editor sent a journalist abroad ___ the facts about the palace.
explanation: 考点:不定式作目的状语。“派记者出国”的目的是“收集事实”，用 to gather 表目的。

stem: When the article arrived, the editor found that the journalist ___ hundreds of pages.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。“写了数百页”发生在 found 之前，是过去的过去，用 had written。

stem: The president refused ___ any questions about the cost.
explanation: 考点:不定式作宾语。refuse 后固定接 to do，故选 to answer。

stem: By the time the fax came back, the magazine ___ to press.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。by the time + 过去时间点，“付印”在此之前完成，用 had gone。

stem: The journalist was told ___ (send) the exact figures at once.
explanation: 考点:不定式。tell sb. to do 的被动式 be told to do，填 to send。

stem: The assistants ___ necklaces on velvet trays when the car stopped outside.
explanation: 考点:过去进行时。when the car stopped 是突发动作，其前的背景动作用 were arranging。

stem: A large car stood there ___ its headlights on and its horn blaring.
explanation: 考点:with 复合结构。with + 名词 + 介词短语/分词表示伴随状态：“灯亮着、喇叭响着”。

stem: The thieves ___ the window and grabbed the jewellery in seconds.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。砸窗与 grabbed 是接连完成的主线动作，保持过去时一致，用 smashed。

stem: ___ the alarm ringing loudly, the raiders raced down the arcade.
explanation: 考点:with 复合结构。With + the alarm + ringing（主动关系用 -ing）表伴随：“警铃大作之下”。

stem: While the shopkeeper ___ (open) the shop, the raid began.
explanation: 考点:过去进行时。while 引导的持续背景动作与突发的 began 对照，填 was opening。

stem: ___ you ever put a banknote in the washing machine by mistake?
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。ever 提示询问到目前为止的经历，用 Have you ever done...?

stem: Thousands of damaged notes ___ by the bank every year.
explanation: 考点:一般现在时被动。notes 是被兑换的对象，every year 表示经常性事实，用 are replaced。

stem: The remains of the notes ___ to the bank for examination.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。remains 是被寄送的对象，强调已完成并等待结果，用 have been sent。

stem: She ___ in the claim form already, so now they can only wait.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。already 提示动作已完成并影响现在（只等结果），用 has filled。

stem: Every year many strange claims ___ (handle) by this special team.
explanation: 考点:一般现在时被动。every year 表经常性，claims 是受动者，填 are handled。

stem: The monastery ___ in the eleventh century as a shelter for travellers.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。found（创建）的过去分词是 founded，修道院是被创建的对象，用 was founded。

stem: ___ by the monks, the dogs can find travellers lost in deep snow.
explanation: 考点:过去分词作状语。dogs 与 train 是被动关系（被训练），句首状语用过去分词 Trained。

stem: Travellers ___ food and shelter at the monastery for centuries.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时被动。for centuries 表示延续至今，travellers 是接受者（被给予），用 have been given。

stem: The monks ___ there prefer the quiet winter months.
explanation: 考点:现在分词作定语。monks 与 live 是主动关系，“住在那里的修士”用 living there 后置修饰。

stem: A new road ___ (build) through the pass many years ago.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时被动。many years ago 表明是过去事件，road 是受动者，填 was built。

stem: The fact ___ cats usually land on their feet fascinates scientists.
explanation: 考点:同位语从句。that 从句解释 the fact 的具体内容，that 在从句中不作成分，不能换成 which。

stem: Cats never ___ to fascinate human beings.
explanation: 考点:一般现在时。陈述猫的普遍习性；主语 cats 是复数，动词用原形 fail，never fail to do 意为“总能”。

stem: By instinct, a falling cat ___ its body in the air and spreads out its legs.
explanation: 考点:一般现在时。科普规律用一般现在时；主语 a falling cat 是三单，动词加 -s，与 spreads 保持一致。

stem: The idea ___ cats have nine lives is only an old saying.
explanation: 考点:同位语从句。that 从句说明 the idea 的内容，从句成分完整，用 that 且不可省略。

stem: The news ___ (that/which) a cat fell ten floors and survived surprised everyone.
explanation: 考点:同位语从句。从句解释 the news 的内容且成分完整，只能用 that，不能用 which。

stem: The builders believed that even if two compartments ___ flooded, the ship would still float.
explanation: 考点:even if 虚拟条件句。主句用 would still float，从句对应虚拟过去式 were flooded。

stem: The liner ___ as unsinkable before she set out on her first voyage.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时被动。“被誉为永不沉没”发生在 set out 之前，是过去的过去，用 had been described。

stem: Even if I ___ a free ticket, I would not sail on such a crowded ship.
explanation: 考点:even if 虚拟条件句。对现在/将来的假设，even if 从句用过去式 had，主句用 would not sail。

stem: By the time the lifeboats were lowered, the great ship ___ to sink.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。by the time + 过去时间点，“开始下沉”在此之前发生，用 had begun。

stem: The captain realized that the iceberg ___ (tear) a huge hole in the ship's side.
explanation: 考点:过去完成时。“划开口子”发生在 realized 之前；tear 的过去分词是 torn，填 had torn。

stem: The officer asked me whether I ___ anything to declare.
explanation: 考点:间接引语。主句 asked 为过去时，转述一般疑问句用 whether + 陈述语序，时态后移为 had。

stem: I explained that the green bottle ___ hair gel, not perfume.
explanation: 考点:间接引语时态后移。explained 为过去时，从句中 is 相应后移为 was。

stem: The officer ___ on the small bottle the moment he opened my case.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。the moment he opened 表明是过去叙事中的连续动作，用 pounced。

stem: Finally he ___ a line on my case with a piece of chalk and let me go.
explanation: 考点:一般过去时。与 let me go 并列的过去动作；draw 的过去式是不规则的 drew。

stem: The tolerant officer said that I ___ (can) go through the green channel.
explanation: 考点:间接引语。主句 said 为过去时，情态动词 can 后移为 could。

stem: If I ___ on a desert island, I would learn to catch fish with a spear.
explanation: 考点:虚拟条件句。对现在的不真实假设，if 从句 be 动词一律用 were，主句用 would do。

stem: Most of us ___ a very unrealistic picture of island life.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。“已经形成”的看法延续影响到现在，主语 most of us 谓语用 have formed。

stem: If there ___ no rain that month, the two sailors would have died of thirst.
explanation: 考点:虚拟条件句（对过去）。主句 would have died 表明是对过去的假设，if 从句用 had been。

stem: If he had better tools now, he ___ a stronger raft.
explanation: 考点:虚拟条件句。if 从句用过去式 had 表对现在的假设，主句用 would + 动词原形。

stem: Since the wreck, they ___ (live) on fish, coconuts and rainwater.
explanation: 考点:现在完成时。since the wreck 表示持续至今，have been living 强调过程，have lived 亦可接受。
